positive: A detailed vector-style illustration featuring a whimsical golden retriever puppy chasing a floating rainbow prism through a stylized bioluminescent forest. The style is bold, clean line art with solid, vibrant color blocking, resembling modern sticker or textile print designs. The composition is centered, focusing on the dynamic movement and whimsical atmosphere. Use a palette of deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, sunny yellows, and soft lavenders. Lighting should be highly saturated and bright, suggesting an ethereal glow filtering through the trees. The subject should have a crisp, clear silhouette against a slightly darker, complementary background for maximum print contrast. Minimalist background detail to maintain focus on the main subjects.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, messy, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, photorealistic, muted colors
